Class PickSimulation

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsw.am22.model.PickSimulation
public class PickSimulation extends Object
Mutable scratch state used during the VALIDATION phase of a pick action. Each card in the selected sequence is given a chance to apply its effect on this simulation in order, so an unaffordable selection can be detected before any real game state is mutated.

The pick order is semantically meaningful:

  • a Builder picked before a Building reduces that Building's cost;
  • a Hunter* picked before a Building feeds the player so they can afford it;
  • a Hunter* picked after another Hunter yields a higher food bonus (the icon's bonus is "per Hunter currently in the tribe", and the simulation mirrors that count).

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addBuilderDiscount(int amount)
    Increases the simulated Builder discount (e.g. a freshly picked Builder).
    void
    addFood(int amount)
    Adds food to the simulation (e.g. a Hunter feeding the tribe).

    Records that one more Hunter has joined the simulated tribe.

  • Constructor Details

    • PickSimulation

      public PickSimulation(int initialFood, int initialBuilderDiscount, int initialHunterCount)
      Parameters:
      initialFood - the player's current food
      initialBuilderDiscount - the tribe's current Builder discount
      initialHunterCount - the number of Hunters currently in the tribe

  • Method Details

    • getFood

      public int getFood()
      Returns:
      the simulated food currently available

    • getBuilderDiscount

      public int getBuilderDiscount()
      Returns:
      the simulated Builder discount currently in effect

    • getHunterCount

      public int getHunterCount()
      Returns:
      the simulated number of Hunters currently in the tribe

    • payFood

      public void payFood(int cost)
      Pays the given food cost.
      Parameters:
      cost - the food to subtract
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the available food is less than cost

    • addFood

      public void addFood(int amount)
      Adds food to the simulation (e.g. a Hunter feeding the tribe).
      Parameters:
      amount - the food to add

    • addBuilderDiscount

      public void addBuilderDiscount(int amount)
      Increases the simulated Builder discount (e.g. a freshly picked Builder).
      Parameters:
      amount - the extra discount

    • incrementHunterCount

      public void incrementHunterCount()
      Records that one more Hunter has joined the simulated tribe.
